title: Promtail Pipeline로그 변환
description: Promtail Pipeline로그 변환 documents pipeline stage material for Promtail in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the observability-system class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Pipeline, Parsing stage, cri, multiline, and Transform stage, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include pipeline, promtail pipeline로그 변환, pipeline-stage, infrastructure, and observability, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / observability / promtail / pipeline-stage, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
